---
name: Explore Feature
description: Understand how an existing feature works — get a plain-English map of code, data flow, and user experience
agent: explore
argument-hint: Feature name (e.g., cooking mode, grocery list, recipe import)
---

Explain how the **${1:feature}** feature works in the recipes app.

I want to understand:

1. What the user sees and does
2. Which files handle it (components, stores, APIs, services)
3. How data flows from user action to database and back
4. What E2E tests exist for it
